prompt: Title: Harry Potter Author: J.K.Rowling Tape of Story: Magic novel Setting: 2000/England Main Characters: Harry Potter Plot: He was learning magic lesson in the Magic School. There were a lot of strange things took place. J.K.Rowling wrote a very popular novel called ,"Harry Potter." It is a magic story that begin in England. Harry Potter was a orphan. He lived with his aunt's family. When he was eleven years old he was received many letter from a Magic School.%% He went to the mystery school and started his extraordinary life.
